titleZh: 赵良臣与沈敏、海南盛德环凯置业有限公司追加被执行人执行异议之诉案
titleEn: Reference Case: Zhao Liangchen v. Shen Min and Hainan Shengde Huankai Real Estate Co., Ltd.
citation: 最高法判决：抽逃出资后内部抵销不得对抗第三人
decisionType: 追加被执行人执行异议之诉
issuesEn: post hoc internal set-off by shareholder resolution
holdingZh: 股东在公司成立后将已缴出资迅速转回本人账户，且不能证明系依法用于公司经营的，构成抽逃出资。此后公司股东会作出以股东对公司垫款冲抵出资的内部决议，仅具有公司内部效力，不得对抗公司外部债权人，也不能作为该股东已补足出资的证据。
holdingEn: Where a shareholder rapidly transfers paid-in capital back to a personal account after incorporation and cannot prove that the funds were lawfully used for the company's business, the conduct constitutes withdrawal of capital. A later shareholder resolution internally setting off loans against the contribution has only internal effect, cannot defeat outside creditors, and does not prove that the contribution was replenished.
